stream_name: Evidence corpus + canonical receipts (MBD4/ATR + live API proofs)

audit_method.approach: Every canonical receipt has its JSON re-parsed at generation time. High-stakes claims (tier, verdict, endpoint SHA) are read directly from the file — never reconstructed from memory or summary.

correction_lock.issue: Prior session drafted claims about MBD4/ATR-WEE1 that conflated the axis's TARGET tier (Strong) with its current tier.

audit_method.verbatim_policy: For MBD4/ATR claims, all downstream text must read from receipt:mbd4_atr_evidence_matrix_v2.attributes.canonical_state; no free-text tier assertions.

entities.name: MBD4 × ATR/WEE1 evidence matrix (v2)
entities.what_it_solves: The canonical evidence receipt for the MBD4 × ATR/WEE1 axis — the highest-stakes claim CrisPRO makes for this bundle.
entities.how_it_solves: Structured JSON with one modality_cell per evidence source (CRISPR co-dependency, CRISPR MSI-stratified, PRISM, GDSC2, TCGA-OV, UCEC survival, pan-cancer LOF, dependency probability). Each cell has a verdict + why-it-does-not-support-STRONG. The overall_verdict block is the ground truth for the tier statement.
entities.why_it_exists: Prevents any downstream summariser from silently upgrading MBD4 × ATR/WEE1 to STRONG. Every module reads the receipt, not memory.

overall_verdict.justification: All 5 computational modalities return NULL or MISSING. The one marginal signal (TCGA-OV RS score Wilcoxon p=0.016) uses expression as a proxy and does not survive Spearman correlation. MBD4-LOF is too rare in all public datasets (0.19% pan-cancer, 1.02% in DepMap) to power any statistical test. No published clinical trial has tested ATRi/WEE1i in MBD4-LOF patients.
overall_verdict.fundamental_limitation: MBD4 is a DNA repair gene — its LOF cannot be reliably proxied by expression level. The correct experimental model (isogenic MBD4-KO) is not represented in any public dataset.
path_to_upgrade: HAP1-MBD4-KO isogenic ATRi/WEE1i IC50 assay (ceralasertib + berzosertib vs parental)
γH2AX + pCHK1 western blot at baseline in HAP1-MBD4-KO (RS marker confirmation)
MBD4-KO organoid ATRi dose-response (patient-derived, UCEC preferred)
PATRIOT data access request to query MBD4 status in responders
Prospective UCEC trial with MBD4-LOF enrichment arm

tier_upgrade_assessment.upgrade_rule: BH-adjusted p < 0.05 AND Cohen's d < -0.5 for A6 Group A vs Group B (ATR)
tier_upgrade_assessment.rationale: Upgrade criterion NOT met. A6 ATR A vs B: padj=0.229 (>0.05), Cohen's d=-0.129 (>-0.5). A7 is DESCRIPTIVE (n=2 LOF, no inferential test, inconsistent RS direction). A8 is NEGATIVE (pan-essentiality ceiling effect, CHEK1/WEE1 wrong direction). Overall tier remains: Mechanistic candidate only.

verbatim_evidence.context: overall_verdict.tier_change value — canonical answer to 'did the tier change?'
target_tier top-level field — what upgrade WOULD be, not what is.

gaps_still_open: MBD4-LOF cannot be reliably proxied by expression level (fundamental limitation noted in overall_verdict).
No clinical readout: no ATRi/WEE1i trial has published MBD4-LOF stratified data.
CRISPR MBD4-LOF vs WT contrast is confounded by MSI-H collinearity.

entities.name: CrisPRO live API proof (commit-anchored)
entities.what_it_solves: Endpoint-level proof that the deployed crispro-backend-v3 exposes the SL + bundle routes at a specific commit.
entities.how_it_solves: crispro_live_api_proof.json records commit SHA + endpoint paths. Companion files sl_endpoint_mbd4_live.json / bundle_endpoint_mbd4_live.json store the actual JSON returned for the MBD4 test case.
entities.why_it_exists: Turns the roadmap's claimed endpoints into observable receipts. Any drift between roadmap and deployment shows up as a diff against this file.

fix_1_gdsc_receipt.verdict: PASS — GDSC receipt overrides pharmacologic NEGATIVE, tier upgrades to Mechanistic candidate only

fix_2_rs_features.verdict: PASS — rs_features flows through all three SLRequest constructors and the BundleRequest model

fix_3_matrix_dictatorship.verdict: PASS — WRN and PKMYT1 drugs fully dropped from panel, no ghost payload

entities.name: POST /api/agents/synthetic_lethality
entities.what_it_solves: Direct SL engine endpoint — returns tier-assigned axis results for a PatientState.
entities.how_it_solves: Live commit + response body captured in sl_endpoint_mbd4_live.json. Top-level keys observed in this response: ['patient_id', 'disease', 'gating', 'evidence_matrix', 'synthetic_lethality_detected', 'double_hit_description', 'essentiality_scores', 'broken_pathways', 'essential_pathways', 'recommended_drugs', 'suggested_therapy', 'explanation', 'calculation_time_ms', 'evo2_used', 'provenance']
entities.why_it_exists: Exposes the engine as a peer-callable service (used by the Ayesha bundle and by direct API consumers).

entities.name: POST /api/ayesha/therapy-fit/bundle?level=l1&include_synthetic_lethality=true
entities.what_it_solves: Composite therapy-fit bundle endpoint — the front-end's primary read.
entities.how_it_solves: Live commit + response body captured in bundle_endpoint_mbd4_live.json. Top-level keys observed: ['contract_version', 'patient_id', 'requested_levels', 'generated_at', 'levels', 'tests_needed', 'patient_context', 'synthetic_lethality', 'sl_status']
entities.why_it_exists: Single call for the clinician UI: bundles SL + safety + trials + SOC + biomarkers behind one contract.

entities.name: MBD4/ATR analysis A1 — Co-dependency (pan-cancer + lineage)
entities.what_it_solves: Analysis 'A1' contributing modality evidence to the MBD4/ATR-WEE1 receipt.
entities.how_it_solves: DepMap CRISPR co-dependency scan for MBD4 across cell lines and lineages; scatter + tables.
entities.why_it_exists: Tests whether cells needing MBD4 also need ATR/WEE1 (the SL premise).

entities.name: MBD4/ATR analysis A1b — MBD4-LOF stratified CRISPR (violin)
entities.what_it_solves: Analysis 'A1b' contributing modality evidence to the MBD4/ATR-WEE1 receipt.
entities.how_it_solves: Violin plot + CSV of ATR/CHEK1/WEE1 CRISPR score in MBD4-LOF vs WT lines.
entities.why_it_exists: Directly tests 'is checkpoint machinery MORE essential when MBD4 is LOF?'

entities.name: MBD4/ATR analysis A2 — PRISM drug-viability screen
entities.what_it_solves: Analysis 'A2' contributing modality evidence to the MBD4/ATR-WEE1 receipt.
entities.how_it_solves: AUC vs MBD4 expression for ATRi/WEE1i in PRISM screen.
entities.why_it_exists: Pharmacology mirror of A1 — does drug knockdown recapitulate genetic knockdown?

entities.name: MBD4/ATR analysis A3 — TCGA-OV replication-stress score
entities.what_it_solves: Analysis 'A3' contributing modality evidence to the MBD4/ATR-WEE1 receipt.
entities.how_it_solves: TCGA ovarian cohort RS score computation + MBD4 status.
entities.why_it_exists: Grounds the RS framework in a real clinical cohort (ovarian is the seed cancer).

entities.name: MBD4/ATR analysis A4 — Pan-cancer MBD4-LOF frequency
entities.what_it_solves: Analysis 'A4' contributing modality evidence to the MBD4/ATR-WEE1 receipt.
entities.how_it_solves: Descriptive frequency of MBD4-LOF across TCGA tumor types.
entities.why_it_exists: Establishes the addressable population size — critical for later 'can we ever power a clinical trial?' question.

entities.name: MBD4/ATR analysis A5 — Literature evidence pack
entities.what_it_solves: Analysis 'A5' contributing modality evidence to the MBD4/ATR-WEE1 receipt.
entities.how_it_solves: Curated literature evidence supporting the MBD4 mechanism claim.
entities.why_it_exists: Bridges computational signals to published biology (dedicated A5_literature/ subfolder).

entities.name: MBD4/ATR analysis A6 — MSI-stratified CRISPR (deconfounding attempt)
entities.what_it_solves: Analysis 'A6' contributing modality evidence to the MBD4/ATR-WEE1 receipt.
entities.how_it_solves: Stratify MBD4-LOF vs WT WITHIN MSI-H to see if MBD4-specific signal exists beyond MSI.
entities.why_it_exists: Addresses the MSI-H collinearity confounder that is the primary blocker on STRONG tier.

entities.name: MBD4/ATR analysis A7 — UCEC RS-score scatter
entities.what_it_solves: Analysis 'A7' contributing modality evidence to the MBD4/ATR-WEE1 receipt.
entities.how_it_solves: UCEC-specific RS signature vs MBD4 correlation.
entities.why_it_exists: Second cohort test after TCGA-OV — checks whether the RS-MBD4 signal generalises.

entities.name: MBD4/ATR analysis A8 — Dependency probability bar
entities.what_it_solves: Analysis 'A8' contributing modality evidence to the MBD4/ATR-WEE1 receipt.
entities.how_it_solves: Binary >0.5 dependency probability across ATR/CHEK1/WEE1 in MBD4-LOF vs WT.
entities.why_it_exists: Complements A1b: does the standard DepMap 'essential' cutoff show MBD4-LOF enrichment?

entities.name: MBD4/ATR analysis A9 — AZD6738 / pharmacology benchmark
entities.what_it_solves: Analysis 'A9' contributing modality evidence to the MBD4/ATR-WEE1 receipt.
entities.how_it_solves: GDSC2 AZD6738 AUC violin + effect-size benchmark.
entities.why_it_exists: Turns 'checkpoint inhibitor sensitivity' into a specific drug-level receipt.

entities.name: ATM benchmark (MSS-only + pan-cancer)
entities.what_it_solves: Positive-control comparator: ATM-LOF is a well-established checkpoint dependency, so it is used to calibrate the MBD4-LOF pipeline.
entities.how_it_solves: ATM_benchmark_MSS_only.csv + ATM_benchmark_pancancer.csv show effect sizes ATM-LOF vs WT for the same pipeline used on MBD4.
entities.why_it_exists: If the pipeline can detect the known ATM signal, absence of MBD4 signal is a real biological finding, not a pipeline artefact.

entities.name: Patient AK — MBD4 SL full extraction + treatment map
entities.what_it_solves: The seed case study that motivated the MBD4/ATR-WEE1 axis: a real patient with MBD4-LOF ovarian cancer.
entities.how_it_solves: AK_MBD4_SL_FULL_EXTRACTION.md is the full case narrative; fig5_patient_ak_gap.png and diagram4_patient_ak_treatment_map.png visualise the treatment gap.
entities.why_it_exists: Anchors the abstract SL work in a concrete patient — the 'if we had this earlier' motivator for every downstream artefact.

entities.name: MBD4 × ATRi IC50 protocol
entities.what_it_solves: Wet-lab protocol design for validating the MBD4/ATR SL axis in cell lines.
entities.how_it_solves: Step-by-step IC50 protocol targeting the specific MBD4-LOF vs WT contrast the computational evidence could not resolve.
entities.why_it_exists: The computational modality cells cannot deconfound MBD4 from MSI-H — wet-lab is the only path to STRONG tier for this axis.
gaps_still_open: Protocol authored but not executed as of the receipt snapshot.

entities.name: Supplemental data provenance
entities.what_it_solves: Structured record of data lineage for every supplemental table/figure in the MBD4/ATR bundle.
entities.how_it_solves: SUPPLEMENTAL_DATA_PROVENANCE_v2.md and v3.md list source dataset → filter → derived file for each artefact.
entities.why_it_exists: Publication-grade requirement: reviewer must be able to reconstruct every value from a public dataset ID.

entities.name: MBD4/ATR manuscript versions (v2 → v4)
entities.what_it_solves: Version chain of the MBD4/ATR manuscript, with paired diff files.
entities.how_it_solves: manuscript_v2 → v3 → v4 (latest); manuscript_diff_v1 and _v2 capture the reasoning behind each revision.
entities.why_it_exists: Living document tracking how the tier claim evolved as evidence accumulated (or failed to).

entities.name: MBD4 Full Intelligence Report (v1 → v3)
entities.what_it_solves: Narrative summary of the MBD4/ATR SL evidence for non-technical readers.
entities.how_it_solves: MBD4_Full_Intelligence_Report v1/v2/v3 — v3 is latest and reflects the NO-CHANGE tier verdict.
entities.why_it_exists: Bridge document from evidence matrix to stakeholders who won't read modality cells.

entities.name: SL repo gauntlet preflight
entities.what_it_solves: Preflight checklist run against the SL engine repo before allowing the MBD4/ATR receipt to be published as canon.
entities.how_it_solves: 50KB checklist enumerating every invariant + evidence-cell status; a red row anywhere blocks canonisation.
entities.why_it_exists: Prevents 'publish first, discover the invariant regression later' failure mode.

gaps_still_open_stream_level: MBD4/ATR-WEE1 axis remains MECHANISTIC (NO CHANGE verdict). STRONG-tier path requires wet-lab IC50 to deconfound from MSI-H collinearity.
MBD4 LOF cannot be reliably proxied by expression — pipeline limitation, not a computational bug.
Live endpoint response keys were captured but per-key semantic labels are not yet inventoried; ingestion of sl_endpoint_mbd4_live keys is a follow-up.
cross_stream_refs: See stream_sl.json for the engine that produces axis tiers — the receipts here are what those tiers point to.
See stream_brenus.json for downstream manuscript/deck consumers of these receipts.
See stream_moat.json for governance decisions that determine which receipts are canon.
